title: Wathe Custom Role Colors
description: Are some of the role colors to close? Customise them to your Liking!
body:
# Custom Wathe Role Colors

Customize the colors of any role in Wathe! Perfect for colorblind accessibility, personal preference, or just making your favorite roles stand out.

## Features

- **Full Color Customization** - Change the color of any role
- **Per-Role Toggle** - Enable custom colors only for the roles you want
- **Alpha Support** - Includes transparency control for advanced customization
- **Organized Categories** - Roles are sorted into Innocent, Killer, and Neutral tabs for easy navigation
- **Auto-Discovery** - Automatically detects all installed roles
